## start_transcription_job

Starts a transcription job using the job manager and returns the
in-progress UI.

href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/workflow/job_handler.py#L104"
